title: Mulamadhyamakakarika: The Root Verses of the Middle Way
description: Nagarjuna's foundational text of Mahayana philosophy: nothing has inherent existence, everything arises dependently.
introduction: Nagarjuna's foundational text of Mahayana philosophy: nothing has inherent existence, everything arises dependently.

translation.original_text: na svato nāpi parato na dvābhyāṃ nāpy ahetutaḥ | utpannā jātu vidyante bhāvāḥ kvacana kecana
translation.text: Neither from itself nor from another, nor from both, nor without cause, does anything anywhere ever arise.
That which is dependent arising, we call emptiness.
